title: Unveiling the origin of unconventional moire ferroelectricity

paper_analysis.summary: The paper argues that unconventional moiré ferroelectricity in graphene/BN-like heterostructures originates from interfacial sliding ferroelectricity rather than graphene moiré bands, enabling robust conductive ferroelectric behavior with anomalous screening.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: Figures, results, and supporting information are provided in the article and Supplementary Information. No external repository is mentioned; additional relevant data are only available from the corresponding authors upon reasonable request.
